description: Represents a connection report sent by an app agent within an app report.

actionOrigin.description: The origin where the action was taken.
actionOrigin.title: actionOrigin

appComponent.description: The app component that this target represents.
appComponent.title: appComponent

direction.description: The direction of the connection relative to the perspective of the workload.
direction.title: direction

dstIP.description: The destination IP address of the connection.
dstIP.title: dstIP

dstPort.description: The destination port of the connection.
dstPort.title: dstPort

encryption.description: If the connection is encrypted, this field contains details about the discovered encryption details used of the connection.
encryption.title: encryption

hostname.description: The hostname that the connection is made to, if available.
hostname.title: hostname

payloadAppTokenClaims.description: If any, these are the Acuvity AppToken claims that were discovered in the connection payload.
payloadAppTokenClaims.title: payloadAppTokenClaims

payloadAuthTokenClaims.description: If any, these are the Auth Token claims that were discovered in the Authorization header of an HTTP connection payload in case the Authorization token is a JWT.
payloadAuthTokenClaims.title: payloadAuthTokenClaims

payloadInsights.description: List of insights that were discovered from inspecting the connection payload.
payloadInsights.title: payloadInsights

policyID.description: The reference to the policy ID that triggered this action.
policyID.title: policyID

provider.description: The provider that this target represents.
provider.title: provider

socketCookie.description: The unique identifier for the socket connection on the operating host.
socketCookie.title: socketCookie

socketTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the socket was created.
socketTimestamp.title: socketTimestamp

socketType.description: The type of socket from the perspective of the workload and its proxy.
socketType.title: socketType

srcIP.description: The source IP address of the connection.
srcIP.title: srcIP

srcPort.description: The source port of the connection.
srcPort.title: srcPort

workloadGroupHash.description: The hash of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupHash.title: workloadGroupHash

workloadGroupLabel.description: The label format of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupLabel.title: workloadGroupLabel

workloadGroupSetHash.description: The hash of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetHash.title: workloadGroupSetHash

workloadGroupSetLabel.description: The label format of the workload group set this application belongs to.
workloadGroupSetLabel.title: workloadGroupSetLabel

title: ConnectionReport
